title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Black Maria, Kozuki Alliance, Unknown person #15, Robin as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, MOMONOSUKE-KUN! But you have to hide under my clothes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They won't be able to see if we knock them out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I think you took me too literally!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'm not sure if you can't

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they're at death's door, the red scabbards shouldn't be taken lightly.

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: I will finish off the Samurai myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The flying six can't handle them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you dare lift a finger...I got it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You're severely underresti- mating me, Jack.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Since you're actually making things more convenient.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 30 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
